login.title: Takiuru Hoa
login.subtitle: Uru ki tō paemana hoa
login.legalPrefix: Mā te pāwhiri i te haere tonu, ka whakaae koe ki tā mātou

register.title: Waihanga pūkete
register.subtitle: Tāurua ō taipitopito hei tīmata
register.hasAccount: Kei a koe kē tētahi pūkete?
register.legalPrefix: Mā te pāwhiri i te haere tonu, ka whakaae koe ki tā mātou
register.successMessage: Tēnā koe mō te rēhitatanga. Hei whakahohe i tō pūkete, tēnā tirohia tō īmēra ka pāwhiri i te hono manatoko i tukuna atu e mātou ki a koe.
register.passwordsNoMatch: Kāore i te taurite ngā kupuhipa
register.passwordTooShort: Kia 6 neke atu rānei ngā pūāhua o te kupuhipa

twoFactor.title: Motuhēhēnga Tauwehe Rua
twoFactor.descriptionCode: Tāurua te waehere mati-6 mai i tō taupānga whakamotuhēhēnga
twoFactor.descriptionRecovery: Tāurua tētahi o ō waehere whakaora hei takiuru
twoFactor.invalidRecoveryCode: Tāuru koa i tētahi waehere whakaora tika (hōputu: XXXXX-XXXXX)
twoFactor.invalidCode: Tāuru koa i tētahi waehere mati-6
twoFactor.helpText: Kei te raruraru koe? Whakapā atu ki te tautoko mō te āwhina.
twoFactor.invalidCodeError: Waehere muhu. Tēnā kia ngana anō.

setup.subtitle: Kia tatūria koe mō te mahi. Tīpakohia koa tō momo pūkete kia haere tonu.
setup.clinicDescription: E tohu ana ahau i tētahi whare hauora, whare hauora rānei me ngā tohunga maha
setup.labDescription: E tohu ana ahau i tētahi taiwhanga tātaritanga, i tētahi whare whakamātautau rānei
setup.individualDescription: He tohunga hauora takitahi, he kairangahau rānei ahau
setup.setupError: I rahua te whakaoti i te tatūnga. Tēnā kia ngana anō.

messages.errorFallback: I rahua te tuku īmēra tautuhi anō. Tēnā kia ngana anō.

success.title: Tirohia tō īmēra
success.sentTo: I tukua e mātou tētahi hono tautuhi kupuhipa anō ki {{email}}
success.description: Tēnā tirohia tō pouakaroto, ka whai i ngā tohutohu hei tautuhi anō i tō kupuhipa. Ka pau te hono i roto i te 1 haora.
success.retry: Kāore i whiwhi i te īmēra? Tēnā anō

form.title: Kua wareware tō kupuhipa?
form.description: Tāurua tō īmēra, ā, ka tukuna atu e mātou he hono tautuhi anō ki a koe.
form.remember: Kei te maumahara koe ki tō kupuhipa?

validation.length: Kia 8 neke atu rānei ngā pūāhua te roa
validation.uppercase: Kia kotahi neke atu rānei ngā pūmatua
validation.lowercase: Kia kotahi neke atu rānei ngā pūriki
validation.number: Kotahi neke atu rānei te tau
validation.special: Kotahi neke atu rānei te pūāhua motuhake

messages.passwordMismatch: Kāore i te taurite ngā kupuhipa
messages.requirementsMissing: Whakatutuki koa ngā whakaritenga kupuhipa katoa
messages.errorFallback: I rahua te tautuhi kupuhipa anō. Kua pau pea te hononga.

success.title: I Momoho te Tautuhi Kupuhipa Anō
success.description: Kua tutuki pai te whakahōu i tō kupuhipa.

form.title: Tautuhi anō i tō kupuhipa
form.description: Tāurua tō kupuhipa hōu ki raro nei.
form.requirementsMet: E tutuki ana i te kupuhipa ngā whakaritenga katoa
form.passwordsNoMatch: Kāore i te taurite ngā kupuhipa

messages.invalidLink: He hono whakaū muhu. Whakamahia koa te hono mai i tō īmēra.
messages.successFallback: Kua tutuki pai te whakaū i tō īmēra.
messages.errorFallback: I rahua te whakaū i te īmēra. Kua pau pea te hononga.

state.loadingDescription: Taihoa koa kia manatoko mātou i tō wāhitau īmēra...
state.successDescription: Kua tutuki pai te manatoko i tō īmēra.
state.errorDescription: Kāore i taea e mātou tō wāhitau īmēra te whakaū.

success.nextStep: Ināianei ka taea e koe te takiuru ki tō pūkete mā tō īmēra me tō kupuhipa.

error.helpText: Ki te haere tonu tēnei, whakapā atu ki te tautoko, rēhita anō rānei.
